name: Middle of the Linked List
description: Given the head of a singly linked list, return the middle node. If there are two middle nodes, return the second middle node.
constraints: The number of nodes is in [1, 100]. 1 <= Node.val <= 100.

performance.stress_intent: exercise long singly linked lists that punish repeated length recomputation or restart-heavy middle discovery instead of a linear two-pointer pass
